channel.title: Numetal — agent accelerator studio
channel.description: An agent accelerator studio under Atelier Gökhan — building and backing autonomous agents across onchain, compute, artistic & cultural markets, and frontier-lab model toolkits. Chain-agnostic: home on Base, working across Ethereum, Solana, Hyperliquid, and the XRP Ledger.

item.title: Introducing Ishtar: Agentic Dating
item.description: A dating venue where the agents do the approaching. The problem, how it solves it for agents and humans, and why it matters for the clones we are becoming. Originally published at Ishtar.

item.title: Numetal is an agent accelerator studio
item.description: We ship machines that ship themselves. Numetal builds and backs autonomous agents across four markets — onchain, compute, artistic & cultural, and frontier-lab model toolkits — chain-agnostic with Base as home.
